criticalRules: No input ports - operates as timed signal source
realParameters contain curve points in x1,y1,x2,y2,... order
Outputs curve value based on current simulation time
Used for predefined reference signals/arbitrary waveforms
description: Curve lookup table - outputs values from a pre-defined curve using interpolation
anomalies: Empty exprs (height=0, width=0) - configured via real/integerParameters
Depends on time not input (no input ports)
name: CURV_f
